canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>clockwork</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #0a0a0f; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  cursor: crosshair;
}
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H;
function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Web Audio for mechanical clicks
const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
let lastTickTime = 0;

function tick(freq = 800, vol = 0.03) {
  if (audioCtx.currentTime - lastTickTime < 0.05) return;
  lastTickTime = audioCtx.currentTime;
  
  const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
  const filter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  
  osc.type = 'square';
  osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, audioCtx.currentTime);
  osc.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(freq * 0.5, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.02);
  
  filter.type = 'bandpass';
  filter.frequency.value = 1200;
  filter.Q.value = 2;
  
  gain.gain.setValueAtTime(vol, audioCtx.currentTime);
  gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.04);
  
  osc.connect(filter);
  filter.connect(gain);
  gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  
  osc.start();
  osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.05);
}

// Gear class
class Gear {
  constructor(x, y, radius, teeth, speed, phase = 0, driver = null) {
    this.x = x;
    this.y = y;
    this.radius = radius;
    this.teeth = teeth;
    this.toothDepth = radius * 0.15;
    this.speed = speed;
    this.angle = phase;
    this.driver = driver;
    this.hue = 280 + Math.random() * 60; // purple to pink range
    this.driven = [];
    this.lastToothAngle = 0;
    this.highlight = 0;
  }
  
  update(dt) {
    const prevAngle = this.angle;
    
    if (this.driver) {
      // Driven gear - rotate opposite direction, matched by tooth ratio
      const ratio = this.driver.teeth / this.teeth;
      this.angle = -this.driver.angle * ratio;
    } else {
      this.angle += this.speed * dt;
    }
    
    // Click on tooth pass
    const toothAngle = (2 * Math.PI) / this.teeth;
    const currentTooth = Math.floor(this.angle / toothAngle);
    if (currentTooth !== Math.floor(prevAngle / toothAngle)) {
      tick(400 + this.radius * 2, 0.02 + (this.radius / 200) * 0.02);
    }
    
    this.highlight *= 0.95;
  }
  
  draw() {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);
    ctx.rotate(this.angle);
    
    const innerRadius = this.radius - this.toothDepth;
    const outerRadius = this.radius + this.toothDepth * 0.3;
    
    // Gear body
    ctx.beginPath();
    const toothAngle = (2 * Math.PI) / this.teeth;
    
    for (let i = 0; i < this.teeth; i++) {
      const a1 = i * toothAngle;
      const a2 = a1 + toothAngle * 0.3;
      const a3 = a1 + toothAngle * 0.5;
      const a4 = a1 + toothAngle * 0.8;
      
      if (i === 0) {
        ctx.moveTo(Math.cos(a1) * innerRadius, Math.sin(a1) * innerRadius);
      }
      
      // Tooth shape
      ctx.lineTo(Math.cos(a1) * innerRadius, Math.sin(a1) * innerRadius);
      ctx.lineTo(Math.cos(a2) * outerRadius, Math.sin(a2) * outerRadius);
      ctx.lineTo(Math.cos(a3) * outerRadius, Math.sin(a3) * outerRadius);
      ctx.lineTo(Math.cos(a4) * innerRadius, Math.sin(a4) * innerRadius);
    }
    ctx.closePath();
    
    // Fill with gradient
    const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, this.radius);
    const baseLightness = 15 + this.highlight * 20;
    grad.addColorStop(0, `hsl(${this.hue}, 70%, ${baseLightness + 10}%)`);
    grad.addColorStop(1, `hsl(${this.hue}, 60%, ${baseLightness}%)`);
    ctx.fillStyle = grad;
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Edge glow
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${this.hue + 40}, 100%, 60%, ${0.4 + this.highlight * 0.4})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.stroke();
    
    // Inner circle (axle hole)
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(0, 0, this.radius * 0.15, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = '#0a0a0f';
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(180, 100%, 50%, 0.6)`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.stroke();
    
    // Spokes
    const spokeCount = Math.min(6, Math.max(3, Math.floor(this.teeth / 6)));
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${this.hue}, 50%, 25%, 0.8)`;
    ctx.lineWidth = this.radius * 0.08;
    for (let i = 0; i < spokeCount; i++) {
      const a = (i / spokeCount) * Math.PI * 2;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(Math.cos(a) * this.radius * 0.25, Math.sin(a) * this.radius * 0.25);
      ctx.lineTo(Math.cos(a) * innerRadius * 0.85, Math.sin(a) * innerRadius * 0.85);
      ctx.stroke();
    }
    
    // Decorative inner ring
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(0, 0, this.radius * 0.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(180, 80%, 40%, 0.3)`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    ctx.stroke();
    
    ctx.restore();
  }
}

// Create gear train
const gears = [];

function createGearTrain() {
  gears.length = 0;
  
  // Main drive gear in center
  const mainGear = new Gear(W * 0.5, H * 0.5, 80, 24, 0.3);
  gears.push(mainGear);
  
  // Add connected gears
  addConnectedGear(mainGear, Math.PI * 0.25, 50, 15);
  addConnectedGear(mainGear, Math.PI * 0.75, 60, 18);
  addConnectedGear(mainGear, Math.PI * 1.25, 45, 14);
  addConnectedGear(mainGear, Math.PI * 1.7, 70, 21);
  
  // Second layer
  if (gears[1]) addConnectedGear(gears[1], -Math.PI * 0.3, 35, 11);
  if (gears[2]) addConnectedGear(gears[2], Math.PI * 0.2, 55, 17);
  if (gears[3]) addConnectedGear(gears[3], Math.PI * 1.5, 40, 12);
  if (gears[4]) addConnectedGear(gears[4], Math.PI * 0.9, 50, 15);
  
  // Third layer
  if (gears[5]) addConnectedGear(gears[5], -Math.PI * 0.5, 30, 9);
  if (gears[6]) addConnectedGear(gears[6], Math.PI * 0.4, 45, 14);
  if (gears[7]) addConnectedGear(gears[7], Math.PI * 1.2, 35, 11);
}

function addConnectedGear(parent, angleFromParent, radius, teeth) {
  // Calculate position - gears mesh at their pitch circles
  const distance = parent.radius + radius + 2; // small gap for visual clarity
  const x = parent.x + Math.cos(angleFromParent) * distance;
  const y = parent.y + Math.sin(angleFromParent) * distance;
  
  // Check bounds
  if (x < radius || x > W - radius || y < radius || y > H - radius) return null;
  
  // Check overlap with existing gears
  for (const gear of gears) {
    const dx = gear.x - x;
    const dy = gear.y - y;
    const minDist = gear.radius + radius - 5;
    if (Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) < minDist) return null;
  }
  
  const gear = new Gear(x, y, radius, teeth, 0, 0, parent);
  parent.driven.push(gear);
  gears.push(gear);
  return gear;
}

createGearTrain();

// Mouse interaction
let mouseX = W / 2, mouseY = H / 2;
let mouseDown = false;

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
  mouseDown = true;
  audioCtx.resume();
  
  // Try to add a gear near click position
  let closest = null;
  let closestDist = Infinity;
  
  for (const gear of gears) {
    const dx = gear.x - e.clientX;
    const dy = gear.y - e.clientY;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    if (dist < closestDist) {
      closestDist = dist;
      closest = gear;
    }
  }
  
  if (closest && closestDist < 300) {
    // Add gear extending from closest gear toward click
    const angle = Math.atan2(e.clientY - closest.y, e.clientX - closest.x);
    const newRadius = 25 + Math.random() * 40;
    const newTeeth = Math.floor(8 + Math.random() * 12);
    const newGear = addConnectedGear(closest, angle, newRadius, newTeeth);
    if (newGear) {
      newGear.highlight = 1;
      tick(600, 0.08);
    }
  }
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => mouseDown = false);

// Main animation
let lastTime = performance.now();

function animate(time) {
  const dt = Math.min((time - lastTime) / 1000, 0.1);
  lastTime = time;
  
  // Clear with trail
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Mouse influence on main gear speed
  const mainGear = gears[0];
  if (mainGear) {
    const dx = mouseX - mainGear.x;
    const dy = mouseY - mainGear.y;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    const targetSpeed = 0.2 + (1 - Math.min(dist / 400, 1)) * 0.8;
    mainGear.speed += (targetSpeed - mainGear.speed) * 0.02;
    
    if (mouseDown) {
      mainGear.speed = 1.5;
    }
  }
  
  // Update all gears
  for (const gear of gears) {
    gear.update(dt);
  }
  
  // Draw connection lines (axle supports)
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.1)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  for (const gear of gears) {
    if (gear.driver) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(gear.x, gear.y);
      ctx.lineTo(gear.driver.x, gear.driver.y);
      ctx.stroke();
    }
  }
  
  // Draw gears (back to front by size)
  const sortedGears = [...gears].sort((a, b) => b.radius - a.radius);
  for (const gear of sortedGears) {
    gear.draw();
  }
  
  // Ambient particles (metal shavings / sparks)
  if (Math.random() < 0.1) {
    const gear = gears[Math.floor(Math.random() * gears.length)];
    if (gear) {
      const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
      const px = gear.x + Math.cos(angle) * gear.radius;
      const py = gear.y + Math.sin(angle) * gear.radius;
      particles.push({
        x: px, y: py,
        vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2,
        vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2 + 0.5,
        life: 1,
        hue: 40 + Math.random() * 20
      });
    }
  }
  
  // Update and draw particles
  for (let i = particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const p = particles[i];
    p.x += p.vx;
    p.y += p.vy;
    p.vy += 0.05;
    p.life -= 0.02;
    
    if (p.life <= 0) {
      particles.splice(i, 1);
      continue;
    }
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, 2 * p.life, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${p.hue}, 100%, 70%, ${p.life * 0.5})`;
    ctx.fill();
  }
  
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

const particles = [];

// Touch support
canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  audioCtx.resume();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouseX = touch.clientX;
  mouseY = touch.clientY;
  mouseDown = true;
  
  canvas.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousedown', {
    clientX: touch.clientX,
    clientY: touch.clientY
  }));
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouseX = touch.clientX;
  mouseY = touch.clientY;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => mouseDown = false);

// Start
animate(performance.now());

// Rebuild on resize
window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
  setTimeout(createGearTrain, 100);
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
